Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Oct-03-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT TESLA, INC.'s Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to compel arbitration is granted and the matter is stayed pending arbitration.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
